roa.docketEntryComment: DEF MOT REL OR BAIL REDUCTION FILE

/CAL:JURY TRIAL/DAWT/X:PC 1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE IS FILED IN COURT BY THE PUBLIC DEFENDER,/X:THE PEOPLE ARE NOT YET READY FOR TRIAL, DEFENSE IS READY,/CONTD:JURY TRIAL AND DEFENSE MOTION TO SUPPRESS/DOPC/

/CAL: TRIAL READINESS CONFERENCE/X: THIS PROCEEDING IS NOT REPORTED,/NP/CTORD: MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON: THIS IS A ORANGE GROUPCASE; THE ORANGE GROUP WAS TO REMAIN IN DEPARTMENT 17 TODAY,/

/CAL: DEFENSE'S MOTION FOR O,R, RELEASE OR BAIL REDUCTION/X: DEFENSE'S MOTION FOR O,R, IS GRANTED/OR/WEAP/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL ELECTRONIC MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD,/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER INFILE,/X: COURT DATES OF 11-30-18 AND 12-03-18 ARE CONFIRMED/LD: 12-17-18//CONTD: TRIAL READINESS ON 11-30-18/CONTD: TRIAL ON 12-03-18/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/X: DA MOTION TO AMEND COMPLAINT TO CORRECT THE CASE REFERRED TO IN COUNT 1TO 18008770 IS GRANTED/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OFALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDTR: 12-17-18/987,2/BAIL:25000/CONTD:TRIAL READINESS ON 11-30-18/CONTD: TRIAL ON 12-03-18/DOP/
/CAL:TRIAL/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFTADV NL:1 AND 2/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
/CAL:TRIAL & MTS/X:DEFENDANT'S APPEARANCE WAS WAIVED WHEN CASE WAS RECALLED/LD:12-17-18/CONTD:TRIAL, MTS AND POSSIBLE DISPO/DOPC/JAVS/
/CAL:SHERIFFS AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/X:MATTER HEARD ON 11-30-18,  SEE MINUTES FOR 11-30-18 LINE 406,/X:BAIL WAS SET AT $5000,  12-03-18 TRIAL CONFIRMED,/
